audio_identity.overall_style: Among the best on the Mega Drive; arcade/adventure RPG soundtrack

notes: T2 tier data: Limited musical documentation available. Wikipedia confirms composers Hiroshi Kawaguchi and Yasuhiro Takagi and notes contemporary review praise for 'music and sound effects amongst the best on the Mega Drive,' but provides no specific tempo, key, chord progression, time signature, or track-by-area data. No SFX characteristic details documented in available sources.
